name: Unify AI
pricing_notes: Pass-through model pricing + small platform fee per request; cost benchmarking included

performance.notes: Routes to fastest available provider for the requested model; latency benchmarking built-in

agent_readiness.notes: AI router with continuous benchmarking. Routes same model across multiple providers (e.g., GPT-4o on Azure vs OpenAI vs Together). Real-time latency/cost benchmarks via API. OpenAI-compatible. 'Benchmark' mode for evaluating routing decisions.

gotchas: Early stage — routing stability and accuracy still maturing
Small fee per request adds up at high volume
Benchmark data quality depends on real-time traffic
best_when: Teams wanting to find cheapest/fastest provider for specific models
Cost optimization by routing to best provider dynamically
Research on LLM provider performance benchmarking
avoid_when: Production systems requiring proven routing reliability
High-volume applications where per-request fees accumulate
Teams with established provider relationships and contracts
summary: Unify AI routes LLM requests to the cheapest/fastest provider for each model using continuous real-time benchmarking. Unlike NotDiamond (which routes between different models), Unify routes the same model across multiple providers (e.g., Llama-3 on Together vs Fireworks vs Groq). OpenAI-compatible API with provider performance transparency.
